audio_description: The audio features a male voice speaking in a neutral tone at a moderate pace, with no significant background noise or emotional inflection.
temporal_description: An older man with gray hair, wearing a dark suit and a patterned bow tie, is shown in a close-up, standing indoors with a wooden door and green wall behind him. He appears to be speaking, with his mouth moving and his head slightly shifting. The scene then cuts to a woman with shoulder-length brown hair, wearing a dark top, who is looking off-screen with her head slightly tilted, her gaze directed to the side. She remains still, with her posture upright and her expression neutral.
